tables.description: Baseline characteristics of patients, including age, PSA, eligibility, and metastatic disease risk group.

tables.description: Primary and secondary outcome measures, including overall survival, failure-free survival, progression-free survival, metastatic PFS, skeletal-related events, and disease-specific survival.

tables.description: Combined analyses and hazard ratios from STAMPEDE and LATITUDE trials for different patient populations.
